title: Hybrid zombie truth model: recoverable vs dead capital
summary: Split zombie truth path so route-present but toxic exits are classified as FAKE_LIQUID terminal/dead while genuinely recoverable intermittent routes remain SOFT_ZOMBIE; suppress normal recovery loops for dead liquidity, add explicit toxic/dead observability events, and align cycle/status truth payload with recoverable vs dead path counts.
why_safe: Changes are narrowly scoped to zombie classification/recovery suppression and observability; no entry logic redesign.
Uses existing runtime signals (sell impact, quote out amount, entry basis, execution failures) with explicit deterministic thresholds.
Preserves existing FINAL_ZOMBIE lifecycle and only routes FAKE_LIQUID/dead liquidity into terminal behavior to avoid retry waste.

expected_results.tests: Zombie truth model tests pass and full suite remains green.

commit_message: Split recoverable zombies from fake liquidity dead capital
notes_for_cursor: Classification map: route-present + toxic exit economics (>=5000 bps sell impact or <3% recovery ratio) => FAKE_LIQUID + FINAL_ZOMBIE terminal dead path; sane intermittent route recovery => SOFT_ZOMBIE recoverable path. Added events: toxic_exit_detected, zombie_declared_dead, recovery_suppressed_dead_liquidity, and summary field zombie_recovery_path_counts for status/dashboard truth.
